query: We're a B2B SaaS — each customer's users sign in and embed a Luzmo dashboard. Right now they can see all customers' rows. How do I lock this down so customer A never sees customer B?
Our designers (designer role) can remove the dashboard's filter and see everyone's data. Token-level filters aren't holding. What's the right pattern here?
Each customer has their own Postgres database with the same schema. How do we point Luzmo at the correct database based on the logged-in user?
Trying to set up account_overrides on createAuthorization but the property doesn't seem to be picked up. Is it called connection_overrides or accountOverrides?
EmbedFilterGroup with `tenant_id = {{tenant_id}}` — I want to also filter by region. Can I create a second EmbedFilterGroup or do I add another parameter to the existing one?
URGENT: customer just emailed that they can see a competitor's pipeline data in their dashboard. We're in the same Luzmo org. What pattern broke?
Setting up row-level security in Luzmo for our healthcare SaaS where each clinic has its own patients. Editors must not be able to bypass the filter.
How does suborganization differ from EmbedFilterGroup for isolating tenants?
We have 200 tenants, each on their own schema in a shared Snowflake. What's the cleanest way to route queries per tenant?
Building parameter_overrides into createAuthorization but want to clear a parameter for one user role. Is there a 'clear' option?
How do I embed a Luzmo dashboard in a public marketing page where everyone sees the same data?
Configuring slots for a stacked bar chart in Flex — label, type, level, aggregationFunc, do I need all of them?
Trying to apply a custom dark theme to our embedded dashboards. Theme API or per-token CSS?
@luzmo/nodejs-sdk or call POST endpoints directly with fetch for a small Node backend?
IQ Chat returns wrong answers when users ask about churn — looks like a column-naming issue. How do I improve IQ accuracy?
Best way to push a 100k-row CSV into a Luzmo dataset?
How do I let users build their own charts inside our app with ACK?
401 errors keep coming back from createAuthorization — env vars look set. What should I check first?
Python script to delete all dashboards with 'test' in the name. With confirmation prompt.
Flex chart is invisible — 0 height — even though I set width=100%.
